'''dopajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:voggy|voggy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voggy|voggy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dopajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopajithi|dopajithi]] || [[word:dopajiji|dopajiji]] || [[word:dopajishi|dopajishi]] || [[word:dopajiki|dopajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopajuthuthu|dopajuthuthu]] || [[word:dopajujuju|dopajujuju]] || [[word:dopajushushu|dopajushushu]] || [[word:dopajukuku|dopajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopajuthu|dopajuthu]] || [[word:dopajuju|dopajuju]] || [[word:dopajushu|dopajushu]] || [[word:dopajuku|dopajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopajufthuf|dopajufthuf]] || [[word:dopajufjuf|dopajufjuf]] || [[word:dopajufshuf|dopajufshuf]] || [[word:dopajufkuf|dopajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopajethe|dopajethe]] || [[word:dopajeje|dopajeje]] || [[word:dopajeshe|dopajeshe]] || [[word:dopajeke|dopajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopajothotho|dopajothotho]] || [[word:dopajojojo|dopajojojo]] || [[word:dopajoshosho|dopajoshosho]] || [[word:dopajokoko|dopajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopajotho|dopajotho]] || [[word:dopajojo|dopajojo]] || [[word:dopajosho|dopajosho]] || [[word:dopajoko|dopajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopajofthof|dopajofthof]] || [[word:dopajofjof|dopajofjof]] || [[word:dopajofshof|dopajofshof]] || [[word:dopajofkof|dopajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfthÃŸf|dopajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfjÃŸf|dopajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfshÃŸf|dopajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfkÃŸf|dopajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dopajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dopajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dopajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dopajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfthÃŸf|dopajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfjÃŸf|dopajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfshÃŸf|dopajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfkÃŸf|dopajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfthÃŸf|dopajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfjÃŸf|dopajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfshÃŸf|dopajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dopajÃŸfkÃŸf|dopajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopajÃḊthÃḊ|dopajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dopajÃḊjÃḊ|dopajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dopajÃḊshÃḊ|dopajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dopajÃḊkÃḊ|dopajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopajathatha|dopajathatha]] || [[word:dopajajaja|dopajajaja]] || [[word:dopajashasha|dopajashasha]] || [[word:dopajakaka|dopajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopajatha|dopajatha]] || [[word:dopajaja|dopajaja]] || [[word:dopajasha|dopajasha]] || [[word:dopajaka|dopajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopajafthaf|dopajafthaf]] || [[word:dopajafjaf|dopajafjaf]] || [[word:dopajafshaf|dopajafshaf]] || [[word:dopajafkaf|dopajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dopajasha|dopajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dopajshÃḋsha|dopajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dopajrosha|dopajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dopajmusha|dopajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dopajyasha|dopajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godopajnkshÃḋsha|godopajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godopajnkrosha|godopajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godopajnkmusha|godopajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godopajnkyasha|godopajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dopapajasha|dopapajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dopapajshÃḋsha|dopapajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dopapajrosha|dopapajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dopapajmusha|dopapajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dopapajyasha|dopapajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godopapajnkshÃḋsha|godopapajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godopapajnkrosha|godopapajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godopapajnkmusha|godopapajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godopapajnkyasha|godopapajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:depÃḊjasha|depÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:depÃḊjshÃḋsha|depÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:depÃḊjrosha|depÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:depÃḊjmusha|depÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:depÃḊjyasha|depÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godepÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|godepÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godepÃḊjnkrosha|godepÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godepÃḊjnkmusha|godepÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godepÃḊjnkyasha|godepÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dopfajasha|dopfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dopfajshÃḋsha|dopfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dopfajrosha|dopfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dopfajmusha|dopfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dopfajyasha|dopfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godopfajnkshÃḋsha|godopfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godopfajnkrosha|godopfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godopfajnkmusha|godopfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godopfajnkyasha|godopfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
